title: Discussing Vague Symptoms

segments.text: I just haven't been feeling right for a few weeks.
I'm tired all the time, even after sleeping.
I've lost a bit of weight without trying.
Any other changes — appetite, mood, bowel habits?
My appetite is okay, but I've felt more anxious than usual.
Okay, let's run some blood work and see what we find.
There are several possibilities, and we'll work through them step by step.

transcript: I just haven't been feeling right for a few weeks. Can you tell me more? It's hard to describe. I'm tired all the time, even after sleeping. I've lost a bit of weight without trying. How much weight? About four kilos. Any other changes — appetite, mood, bowel habits? My appetite is okay, but I've felt more anxious than usual. Okay, let's run some blood work and see what we find. There are several possibilities, and we'll work through them step by step.
